market_context: Calm tape into Tuesday's CPI + bank-earnings double-header: VIX 16, SPY 751.7 holding, no new Iran escalation. The event of the day is the SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR listing (SKHY) — the largest ADR listing in history (~$26.5-29B, surpassing Alibaba 2014). Critical fact the hype ignores: this is NOT a price-discovery IPO — SK Hynix trades live in Seoul, and ADR parity computes to ~$144.86 vs a $149 issue price and a ~$205 pre-market indication. Anyone buying the open pays ~+40% over the same share in Korea, and arbitrage desks exist to close exactly that gap. JPM trim executed at 335.50 per plan; ADSK filled 206.84 with stop live; LITE ran to ~786 without filling the 715 limit — not chased.

position_actions.action: RESTRUCTURE the listing play: cancel or cap the market order; move the 165 limit to 152-155 with a 147 stop; keep the 2-day timer
position_actions.reason: The good parts of your plan: the 2-day time stop and the +10/+20/+30 trim ladder — keep both. The three flaws: (1) this is a cross-listing with a live Seoul anchor at ~$144.86 parity — the 'IPO pump' pattern belongs to price-discovery IPOs, and here every percent above parity is a mechanical arbitrage short; (2) the pop ALREADY happened — issue $149 -> indication ~$205 went to bookbuild allocants; a market order at the open buys their exit, not the pump; (3) inverted sizing — your 3k participates if it works, your 7k fills only if the trade is already failing through 165 (still +14% over parity, with air down to 149/145). If you keep any of it: market tranche max 3k with a hard -8% stop from fill; limit tranche at 152-155 (just above issue/parity where real support lives) with stop 147 — below the issue price the allocants are underwater and selling cascades. Friend's 'if you buy at the prices, you should be profitting' is not a stop — it is a hope.

position_actions.action: PLACE STOP 179 on the ~1.0 unreserved shares — position is currently stopless
position_actions.reason: The 205 sell limit (0.75 sh) reserved part of the position and the old stop got cancelled in the process — T212 will not let two sell orders cover the same shares. Result: 1.74 shares, +569 CZK, zero stop orders. Fix: stop 179 on the ~1.0 shares not reserved by the 205 limit. Same T212 mechanic bit CRWV and AAPL — see below.

position_actions.action: PLACE STOP 75 on the 1.39 unreserved shares
position_actions.reason: 89.91 (+376 CZK), the 100-target sell (0.9 sh) is working but the stop vanished with the same share-reservation mechanic. 1.39 shares are unprotected into a tape with CPI four days out. Stop 75, per Wednesday's raise.

position_actions.action: PLACE STOP 294.5 on the 0.63 unreserved shares
position_actions.reason: 314.43 (+207 CZK), the 318 limit (0.42 sh) is close to printing. The other 0.63 shares carry no stop. After 318 fills, raise the remainder stop to 302. Earnings Jul 30.

position_actions.action: MISSED — do not chase at 786; keep the 715 limit as a deep-pullback catch and wait for a new base
position_actions.reason: LITE ran from the 707 entry to ~786 (+11%) without ever touching 715 — the trade got away, and that is tuition-free this time. At 786 the math is dead: risk to the 665 stop is -15%, reward to the 800 first sell is +1.8%. The long-hold thesis (Nvidia $2B, +105% guide) is unchanged, so the name stays top of the queue: next entry is either the 715 limit filling on a real flush, or a NEW multi-day base above 750 that lets us re-map levels with sane risk. No starter buys at 786.

position_actions.action: DONE — trimmed 0.6 at 335.50 this morning per plan; 0.6 rides through Tuesday
position_actions.reason: Size-down executed before the Jul 14 earnings+CPI double binary. The remaining 0.6 (+26 CZK) has the 345 target and needs its stop re-checked after the trim (319.5). If the print is good, financials lead the next leg; if not, half the risk is already off.

position_actions.action: HOLD — 521 is 1.3% above the 514 stop; let the stop decide, earnings Jul 21
position_actions.reason: -367 CZK, the book's problem child. The guidance-raise thesis gets its verdict at earnings; the stop is close enough that no action is needed — either it holds and the print re-rates it, or the stop enforces the exit. Re-entry after a stop-out: post-earnings reclaim of 540 only.
+78 CZK already at 209.79. Long-hold designation, sells 240 (40%) / 258, earnings Aug 27. Correctly executed: stop placed at entry.

position_actions.action: HOLD — both stop orders (8 + 3.3 sh @ 46.5) correctly cover the full position
position_actions.reason: 48.88 (-214 CZK), catalyst Aug 6. The two-order stop structure is the right way to handle T212's share reservation — same pattern QCOM/CRWV/AAPL need.

position_actions.action: HOLD — green at last (+68 CZK), stop 6.85
position_actions.reason: 7.75, defense complex steady. Sell1 9.80, Cyberhawk Q3.

position_actions.action: Runner riding at 216.93 (+67 CZK); consider stop 205 instead of 185
position_actions.reason: The 0.1 NBIS runner has a 185 stop placed — moving it to 205 locks the round-trip's gain while still giving the AI-infra leg room. Minor sizing, minor point.

watchlist.note: The REAL SK Hynix trade is not day 1: 60% HBM share, the purest AI-memory asset outside MU (+260% YTD comp). Day-1 premium over Seoul parity (~145) must collapse or be earned first
watchlist.trigger: A 2-4 week post-listing base above ~parity+10% (roughly 160+) -> long-hold candidate with re-mapped levels; alternatively premium compression to <10% over parity makes the ADR investable on fundamentals

watchlist.note: June CPI Tuesday Jul 14, 14:30 Prague, same morning as JPM/C/GS earnings. The book is ~65% invested + 20k in working buy orders
watchlist.trigger: Cool print + SPY > 742 -> the LITE/SKHY queue deploys; hot print -> stops (once re-placed!) do the work
Daily close > 17.80, else wait for the Jul 30 print
Reclaim 14.00 before Jul 24 or skip the Jul 27 binary
